summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. The preflight artifact hydrated 40 open pull requests, reported no security-sensitive items, and the job explicitly says not to invent a shared canonical. No close, merge, fix, or label mutations are recommended; each PR is kept independent for normal maintainer review or separate follow-up.
